notes:
## 2.8.3

## What's new

- **Outside-launcher loophole fixed** — Resting Fun apps (including many preinstalled “system” apps like YouTube) are suspended / blocked again when you leave Steady Home. Only real OS shells (System UI, etc.) stay always-on.
- **Recategorize heal** — Undoes the 2.8.1 over-broad “all system = Always” heal so Fun can rest properly.

_Requires Device Owner for system-wide gray/suspend; Accessibility still bounces blocked apps without it. Install on the kid / self-focus phone._
